description_long: This is a modern commercial jet airliner with a streamlined fuselage and a pair of large, swept-back wings mounted low on the body. The wings feature upward-angled winglets at their tips, enhancing aerodynamic efficiency. Two sizable turbofan engines are mounted beneath the wings, one on each side, and the tail section has a conventional design with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers. The airplane's exterior is primarily light gray with subtle markings and a few red accents, and the cockpit is located at the very front of the fuselage with a multi-panel windshield. The landing gear is not visible in the images, suggesting it may be retracted.
description: A sleek, modern commercial jet airliner with low-mounted swept wings, underwing turbofan engines, and a conventional tail. The exterior is light gray with red accents and a forward-placed cockpit.
description_view_0: Front view showing the pointed nose, cockpit windows, and both underwing engines with the full wingspan and upward-angled winglets visible.
description_view_1: Side profile highlighting the elongated fuselage, low-mounted swept wing, and the underwing engine; the tail and cockpit are clearly visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the tail section with a single vertical stabilizer, horizontal stabilizers, and the backs of both engines and winglets.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile showing the other underwing engine, the full length of the fuselage, and the cockpit at the front.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing configuration with long, swept-back wings and upward-angled winglets at the tips.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers
attribute_landing_gear_type: Retractable tricycle (not visible, inferred from typical design)
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed multi-seat cockpit with a multi-panel windshield
